title: Blessing in Christ; church his body
summary_text: Paul to saints in Ephesus—grace peace. Blessed God who blessed in Christ with every spiritual blessing; chose before foundation; predestined adoption; redemption through blood; sealed Holy Spirit. Prayer for enlightened eyes; Christ head over all to church his body fullness.
key_points: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing.
Even as he chose us in him before the foundation of the world.
In whom we have our redemption through his blood.
You were sealed with the Holy Spirit of promise.
He put all things in subjection under his feet, and gave him to be head over all things for the assembly.
evidence_phrases: blessed us with every spiritual blessing
he chose us in him before the foundation
we have our redemption through his blood
you were sealed with the Holy Spirit
the exceeding greatness of his power
gave him to be head over all things

title: Dead made alive; one new humanity
summary_text: You dead in trespasses—God made alive with Christ by grace saved; raised and seated in heavenly places. Saved by grace through faith—not of works. Gentiles far off brought near—one new man, reconciled both in one body, access in one Spirit.
key_points: You were dead through your trespasses and sins.
Even when we were dead through our trespasses, made us alive together with Christ.
For by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves.
For he is our peace, who made both one.
Through him we both have our access in one Spirit to the Father.
evidence_phrases: You were dead through your trespasses
made us alive together with Christ
by grace you have been saved

title: Mystery revealed; prayer for strength
summary_text: Paul prisoner of Christ for Gentiles—dispensation of grace; mystery hidden now revealed—Gentiles fellow heirs. Less than least of saints—unsearchable riches preached. Bow knees for inner strength, love rooted, fullness of God.
key_points: How the mystery was made known to me by revelation.
The Gentiles are fellow heirs, and fellow members of the body.
To me, the very least of all saints, was this grace given.
That Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith.
That you may be filled with all the fullness of God.
evidence_phrases: Christ may dwell in your hearts
filled with all the fullness of God

title: Unity, gifts, new self
summary_text: Walk worthy of calling—one body, Spirit, hope, Lord, faith, baptism, God. Gifts for equipping saints till maturity—speaking truth in love grow to Christ. Put off old man corrupt; renewed mind; put on new created in righteousness. Do not grieve Holy Spirit; be kind forgiving.
key_points: There is one body, and one Spirit.
He gave some to be apostles … for the perfecting of the saints.
Put off the old man … be renewed in the spirit of your mind.
Put on the new man, who in the likeness of God has been created in righteousness.
Be kind to one another, tenderhearted, forgiving each other.
evidence_phrases: for the perfecting of the saints
forgiving each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you

title: Walk in love; marriage; armor
summary_text: Imitate God as beloved children—walk in love as Christ loved and gave himself. Light not darkness—fruit of light. Wives submit husbands; husbands love wives as Christ church. Children obey; masters just. Whole armor of God—stand against evil day.
key_points: Walk in love, even as Christ also loved you.
You were once darkness, but are now light in the Lord.
Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the assembly.
Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.
Praying at all times in the Spirit.
evidence_phrases: you are now light in the Lord
Put on the whole armor of God
praying at all times in the Spirit

title: Children, bondservants, spiritual warfare
summary_text: Children obey parents; bondservants obey masters as Christ; masters treat with justice. Be strong in Lord—whole armor: truth, righteousness, gospel peace, faith, salvation, word of God. Tychicus sent; peace love faith grace.
key_points: Children, obey your parents in the Lord.
Bondservants, be obedient to those who are your masters according to the flesh.
Put on the whole armor of God.
Take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.
Grace be with all who love our Lord Jesus Christ with incorruptible love.
evidence_phrases: Grace be with all who love our Lord Jesus Christ
